creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
Hello,

Several sources (for example, https://blogs.oracle.com/cloud-infrastructure/post/freebsdarm64-now-available-in-oci) indicate that a FreeBSD image for ARM (Ampere) is available in Oracle Cloud. This is really important as OC propose free VMs on this platform. It helps testing and ports management.

Trying to deploy a FreeBSD test server in OC, I cannot find such image. Another users confirm this. There is no answer on my question at their forum https://forums.oracle.com/ords/apexds/post/freebsd-arm64-image-7811

Could someone who manages the relations with the OC have a look, please?

Best regards,
Peter
